name: Snowflake
description: Snowflake is a cloud-native data platform built for warehousing, analytics, governed sharing, and data collaboration across teams.
whyUseIt: Useful when the core business problem is data organisation, analytics, and secure data work rather than general application infrastructure.

vocabulary.definition: The compute layer Snowflake uses to run data workloads.
Snowflake's model for securely sharing data across teams or organisations.

beginnerMistakes: Treating Snowflake like a full replacement for general cloud infrastructure
Thinking the hardest part is the tool rather than data governance and ownership
